data.name: Occupational Hazards: Episode 1
data.detailed_description: Occupational Hazards Episode 1 is an adult-only furry themed mix of a visual novel and a text based RPG with strong focus on sexual content. The main gameplay loop consists of picking a planet to travel to, where you will encounter a unique scenario, and get a choice of how to react in said scenario. Every choice has a unique outcome, and while the game's story is conveyed mainly through text, art accompanies every scenario.
data.about_the_game: Occupational Hazards Episode 1 is an adult-only furry themed mix of a visual novel and a text based RPG with strong focus on sexual content. The main gameplay loop consists of picking a planet to travel to, where you will encounter a unique scenario, and get a choice of how to react in said scenario. Every choice has a unique outcome, and while the game's story is conveyed mainly through text, art accompanies every scenario.
data.short_description: Take on the role of an intergalactic spaceship transporter as she gets involved in plenty of fun and erotic scenarios while trying to do her job.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (SP1+) / Windows 10
  • 處理器: x86 or x64 architecture with SSE2 instruction set support.
  • 顯示卡: DX10 capable
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Game runs through unmodified Unity Player

data.legal_notice: All art and music present in the game have been commissioned and paid for specifically for this game. Artists featured can be found by clicking the "art by" buttons during in-game display.
